mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO symbol (symbol, name, price, updated_time) VALUES
(#{s.symbol}, #{s.name}, #{s.price}, #{s.updatedTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), price = VALUES(price), updated_time = VALUES(updatedTime)
mapper.select: SELECT symbol, name, price, updated_time, imtcode, buy_currency, sell_currency, bid, ask, tenor, spread, status FROM symbol
